expectations.text: Output has at least 3 markdown H2/H3 sections
expectations.evidence: 7 H2 sections: What They Are, The Landscape, Performance Tradeoffs, Use Cases, How to Pick One, Key Takeaways, Sources

expectations.text: Names at least 3 specific vector DB products
expectations.evidence: 11+ products named: Qdrant, Milvus/Zilliz, Weaviate, Chroma, LanceDB, Pinecone, Redis, pgvector, Elasticsearch/OpenSearch, MongoDB, ScyllaDB

expectations.text: Explains what vector similarity search is
expectations.evidence: Explains embeddings, ANN, HNSW/IVF/PQ algorithms, distance metrics (cosine, L2, dot product)

expectations.text: Provides criteria for choosing between options
expectations.evidence: ## How to Pick One with 4-step decision framework, selection table by situation, 8 evaluation axes

expectations.text: Has a summary or key takeaways section
expectations.evidence: ## Key Takeaways with 7 bullet points including the critical insight about embedding model choice mattering more than DB choice

notes: Strongest with-skill output. Includes Q1 2026 benchmark table with actual latency numbers, market shift analysis ('vectors as feature not category'), ScyllaDB GA coverage, and the embedding model > DB choice insight. Sources are dated and specific. 229 lines vs 385 for baseline but denser with actionable signal.
